name: Personal Kanban

releases.author: Jesuspinarte
releases.description:
## Personal Kanban - Initial Alpha Release

This is the first alpha release of Personal Kanban for Obsidian. I'm building this tool to keep my project management simple, local, and fast without the overhead of web-based tools.

> ### **Alpha Warning**
> This plugin is currently in **Alpha stage**. I've built this using an "AI-assisted" workflow (Vibe Coding) to get it up and running quickly. While the core functionality is solid, I'm planning to perform a deep code review and refactoring in the coming updates. Expect some rough edges, and please report any bugs you find!

### Key Features
- **Board Management:** Create, rename, and delete boards.
- **Drag & Drop:** Fully functional reordering of cards, columns, and boards.
- **Workflow:** Quick-add inputs for tasks, columns, and boards (press Enter to create).
- **Native Look:** Minimalist UI that respects your Obsidian theme.
- **Modal Editor:** Clean 70/30 layout for card details, including markdown description, tags, and cross-board transfers.

### How to Install
Since this is an Alpha release, you can install it using the **BRAT** plugin:
1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) from the Obsidian Community Plugins.
2. Go to BRAT settings and click "Add Beta Plugin".
3. Paste the URL of this repository: `Jesuspinarte/obsidian-personal-kanban`.

### Feedback
If you encounter any bugs or have ideas for new features, please [open an issue](https://github.com/Jesuspinarte/obsidian-personal-kanban/issues) here on GitHub.

###  Support ☕
If you find this plugin helpful and want to support its maintenance and future refactoring, you can buy me a coffee here:
[https://ko-fi.com/jesuspinarte](https://ko-fi.com/jesuspinarte)
releases.name: 0.1.0 - Initial Release
